item.title: U.S. and UK Treasuries release 10-point roadmap to align oversight of tokenized securities and stablecoins across both markets.
Regulators face July 18 deadline to finalize GENIUS Act stablecoin issuer rules determining which firms can operate in the U.S.
BlackRock, Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan and Morgan Stanley join UK government's new tokenization taskforce for financial markets.
Trump urges Senate to pass CLARITY Act before August recess; August 7 floor vote is the last viable window for U.S. market structure law.
SEC prepares July rulemaking to exempt certain crypto activities from securities law and clarify custody of tokenized securities.
EU officials move to revise MiCA to extend its regulatory framework to non-EU stablecoin issuers operating in European markets.
JPMorgan will accept BlackRock's iShares Bitcoin Trust shares as loan collateral globally for trading and wealth management clients.
DTCC begins limited production trades on tokenized securities platform ahead of full commercial launch in October 2026.
EDX Markets raises $76 million in Series C round led by SBI Holdings as institutional crypto exchange expands product suite.
Tokenized real-world asset market reaches $43 billion globally, with $15 billion in U.S. Treasury instruments leading all categories.
U.S. Bancorp resumes bitcoin custody services for clients, adding support for spot Bitcoin ETF holdings.
Solana's tokenized real-world asset transfer volume reaches $8.7 billion in 30 days, doubling the prior month's figure.
Security firm Hexens discloses patched critical vulnerability in Aptos blockchain that exposed an estimated $70 billion in systemic risk.
